title: Pro User 9pc Steel Metric Long Torx Key Set - Assorted Metric AF Imperial Socket Wrench Allen Keys
description: Product Description Pro User BB-WR251 10 Pc Long Reach Torque Key Set. This 10pc long reach torque key set is manufactured from chrome vanadium steel & comes packed in a handy plastic holder. The set includes the following sizes; T9, T10, T15, T20, T25, T27, T30, T40, T45 & T50. Box Contains 10x Torque Key
